faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the MADFAM Ecosystem.

q1.question: Can I switch from Individual Pro to Ecosystem Membership?
q1.answer: Yes. When you join the Ecosystem, your Individual Pro subscription is automatically credited towards your membership. No double-charging.

q2.question: Is there a free trial?
q2.answer: Public access varies by platform. Ecosystem Membership unlocks eligible capabilities, coordinated support, and maker-node advantages where applicable.

q3.question: What happens when PENNY and AVALA launch?
q3.answer: They're automatically included in your Ecosystem Membership at no extra cost. You get Pro access on day one.

q4.question: How does the Maker Node discount work?
q4.answer: Ecosystem Members receive up to 20% off all physical fabrication orders through Primavera Maker Node — 3D printing, CNC machining, and laser cutting.

q5.question: Can I cancel anytime?
q5.answer: Yes. Monthly memberships can be cancelled anytime. Yearly memberships are refundable within the first 30 days.

section.title: MADFAM is not one offer. It is an operating environment.
section.subtitle: Start where your intent is clearest. The site should route you to the right product, build track, membership surface, or strategic conversation without forcing you to decode the whole ecosystem first.

platform.title: Start with the product that solves today.
platform.description: Find the MADFAM product that fits your workflow, then move into the broader ecosystem when the work expands.
platform.recommendedFor: Creators, operators, founders, and teams with a specific product need.

build.title: Turn an idea, process, or dataset into a launchable system.
build.description: Use MADFAM as a product, AI, data, commerce, and fabrication partner when execution quality matters.
build.recommendedFor: Companies and founders who need strategic delivery, not just software access.

ecosystem.title: Coordinate eligible platform access, support, and maker-node advantages.
ecosystem.description: Membership is for people and organizations that benefit from MADFAM as an integrated operating environment.
ecosystem.recommendedFor: Makers, entrepreneurs, studios, and teams building across multiple MADFAM surfaces.

partner.title: Connect your institution, capital, or infrastructure to the ecosystem.
partner.description: Create distribution, integration, investment, or ecosystem partnerships with a public-safe entry path.
partner.recommendedFor: Enterprises, institutions, investors, accelerators, and strategic ecosystem partners.
